data.body: 3183 held-out TDD: 2 happy (verify-authorship flags unsigned when required / advisory when off) + 5 held-out (reducer never-rejects bad-sig[valid guard], reduced-state signed/unsigned counts, write-gate fail-fast, snapshot-roundtrip-verify). Fixed test bug (redundant add_identity_key after create_identity(keys=) genesis-seeds). RED confirmed. Implementer dispatched. 4b5b(docs) plan authored + reviewing. 7 leaves committed/pushed; 3183 implementing, 4b5b last.
